description: Local PRD tracker stories for Kollywood dogfooding.

acceptanceCriteria: The admin page /admin no longer shows stat cards for Running, Retrying, Claimed, Completed counts
The admin page no longer shows a completed issues badge list
userStories.description:
The orchestrator section of the admin page (`/admin`) currently shows four stat cards (Running, Retrying, Claimed, Completed) and a 'Completed this session' badge list. These are low-value in-memory stats that reset on restart. Remove them.

Specifically:
- Remove the four `<.stat_card>` components (running_count, retry_count, claimed_count, completed_count) and their wrapping grid div from `orchestrator_section` in `lib/kollywood_web/live/admin_live.ex`.
- Remove the `<.completed_table>` component call and the `completed_table/1` function definition.
- Remove the `stat_card/1` function definition.
- In `lib/kollywood/orchestrator.ex`, remove `completed_issue_ids` from the status map returned by the `status/0` function (the `completed_count` line added alongside it can stay if other things use it, but `completed_issue_ids` is only used by the now-removed UI).
- Run `mix format` and `MIX_ENV=test mix test` to verify nothing is broken.
- Commit with a conventional commit message (no Co-Authored-By).

userStories.title: Remove stat cards and completed session list from admin orchestrator section
